welcome_title: Welcome to the Posner Cuing Paradigm
welcome_p1: This task measures spatial attention — how a brief visual cue on one side of the screen influences how fast you detect a target appearing on either side.
welcome_p2: Fix your gaze on the central cross throughout. Two boxes appear to the left and right. One of them will briefly flash (the cue). Shortly after, the letter X may appear inside either box. Press the SPACE bar as fast as you can when you see the X.
welcome_p3: The cue does not predict where the target will appear. The test contains {{trials}} trials and takes around 5 minutes.
tutorial_step1_title: Keep your eyes on the center
tutorial_step1_text: Always look at the central cross (+). Do not move your eyes toward the boxes.
tutorial_step2_text: One of the two outline boxes will briefly get thicker. This is the cue. It does not tell you where the target will be.
tutorial_step3_text: When the letter X appears inside either box, press the SPACE bar as quickly as possible.
tutorial_step4_text: Do not press SPACE before you actually see the X. Some trials have no target — on those, do not press anything.
demo_intro: Watch a single trial unfold below.
demo_step1: Step 1 — Fixate on the central cross. Two outline boxes flank it.
demo_step2: Step 2 — One of the boxes briefly flashes (the cue). Here it flashes on the right.
demo_step3: Step 3 — After a short delay, the letter X appears in one of the boxes.
demo_step4: Step 4 — Press SPACE as fast as you can when you see the X.
demo_step5: Step 5 — The cue does not predict the target side. Respond regardless of cue location.
demo_step6: You understand how it works. Ready to practice?
practice_complete_text1: Well done! You're ready for the full test.
practice_complete_text2: Keep your eyes on the central cross, respond as fast as possible to the X, and do not press on catch trials.
countdown_instruction: Press SPACE when you see the letter X.
bottom_instruction: Fix your eyes on the + and press SPACE as soon as you see the X.
feedback_too_early: Too early — wait for the X!
feedback_false_alarm: No target — don't press on catch trials.
results_chart_title: Mean Reaction Time by Cue-Target Interval
footer_description: A test of spatial attention using a peripheral cue followed by a lateral target.
settings_total_trials_desc: Total number of trials in the test.
settings_fixation_duration_desc: How long the fixation cross is shown alone before the cue.
settings_cue_duration_desc: How long one box's border thickens to serve as the spatial cue.
settings_target_timeout_desc: Maximum time to respond once the target appears.
settings_validity_ratio_desc: Proportion of target trials where the cue matches the target side. 50% is a non-predictive cue.
settings_no_target_ratio_desc: Proportion of trials with no target (catch trials). Used to detect anticipatory responses.
settings_countdown_desc: Countdown shown before the test begins.
